events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Cyndi Lauper, known for her distinctive style and powerful vocals, was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: It's Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday today! From 'Girls Just Want To Have Fun' to 'Time After Time', her unique sound defined an era.

events.title: Remembering George Michael, would have been 63
events.blurb: English singer, songwriter, and record producer George Michael, born on June 25, 1963, tragically passed away in 2016.

angles.name: Faithful Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music, from Wham! to his solo career, continues to resonate.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: June 25, 2026 marks 17 years since the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who passed away on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: 17 years ago today, we lost the incomparable Michael Jackson. His musical legacy and impact on pop culture remain unmatched.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! Keep spreading that peace and love, Ringo!

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian Harold May, the iconic lead guitarist of Queen and astrophysicist, was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May! Still rocking the world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy is still undeniable! Happy birthday to the rock and roll icon.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago today
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV changed the game forever, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony, right?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, shaping the sound of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Still sounds as fresh as '94! Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32 this month. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable cultural moment.

events.title: 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley
events.blurb: August 16, 2026 marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and iconic performances continue to define rock and roll.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas and tragically died from his injuries six days later on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Legendary Flow
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, whose powerful lyrics and undeniable talent left an indelible mark on music.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: September 2, 2026 marks 56 years since the death of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his passing. His influence on guitar music is eternal.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' is 57 years old this month. Still one of the most recognisable album covers and soundtracks of all time.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde, best known as the frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice continues to captivate.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Liam Gallagher, known as the former frontman of Oasis and Beady Eye, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that signature swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK on October 24, 1975 (as a single from 'Shaved Fish'). The album was released in September 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: It's 55 years since John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A message that still resonates deeply today.

events.title: The first Apple iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? It was unveiled 25 years ago this month, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing music forever.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to blast some iconic Bond themes and decide once and for all: who's the best Bond?

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter and co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, was born on October 9, 1940. He was tragically killed in 1980.

angles.name: Imagine Forever
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message live on.
